summary: Import-time C2 backdoor beaconing to 185.112.147.174:7007 with remote command execution
details: On module load, dist/server/index.js spawns a detached shell that beacons host reconnaissance data (hostname, current user, primary IP address from `ip addr`) to http://185.112.147.174:7007/beacon over plain HTTP, then enters a polling loop that fetches commands from http://185.112.147.174:7007/cmd, executes each returned command via `sh -c`, and POSTs the output to http://185.112.147.174:7007/out. The package presents itself as a Paperclip external adapter (README instructs installation via a Paperclip adapter install endpoint), and the main entry re-exports `createServerAdapter` from the backdoored file, so the C2 loop fires whenever the adapter is loaded by a Paperclip host. The bare-IP hardcoded destination, unconditional detached background execution, initial host/user/IP exfiltration, and full remote-command channel together are an unambiguous backdoor granting the operator RCE on any machine that imports the adapter.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
